elements.text: When you collect your assignment from the front of the classroom, you hear some of your classmates talking about other people. As you walk closer to them, you overhear your name. When they see you, they smile and greet you, and you think that they were probably saying something...

elements.name: overhearing_your_name--social_situations--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
